title: ArchProject
description: JSON Schema for architect.json files produced by the ArchViber plugin. Validates the canonical architecture data format (schemaVersion 1+).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version number. Starts at 1 and increments on breaking changes.

nodes.description: All nodes in the architecture graph — containers and blocks.

decisions.description: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs). Optional Phase 4 extension.

metadata.description: Arbitrary project-level metadata. No schema constraints.

ArchNode.description: A node in the architecture graph — either a container (grouping) or a block (unit of work).

ArchContainer.title: ArchContainer
ArchContainer.description: A logical grouping node. Visually displayed as a colored region containing blocks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier for this node.

color.description: Visual accent color for the container region.

collapsed.description: If true, children are hidden in the diagram UI.

ArchBlock.title: ArchBlock
ArchBlock.description: A unit of work (service, component, module). Can be grouped inside a container.

id.description: Unique stable identifier for this node.

description.description: Short description of what this block does.

status.description: Current build/implementation status of this block.

parentId.description: ID of the parent ArchContainer. Omit for orphan (ungrouped) blocks.

techStack.description: Comma-separated or free-text technology stack description.

summary.description: Free-text summary of the block's implementation state.

errorMessage.description: Error or blocker description when status is "error" or "blocked".

ArchEdge.title: ArchEdge
ArchEdge.description: A directed dependency edge between two nodes.

id.description: Unique stable identifier for this edge.

source.description: ID of the source node. Convention: source depends on target.

type.description: Communication pattern. sync = request/response, async = event/queue, bidirectional = both directions.

DesignDecision.title: DesignDecision
DesignDecision.description: An Architecture Decision Record (ADR) capturing a significant design choice.

id.description: Unique stable identifier for this decision.

context.description: Background and problem statement that drove the decision.

chosen.description: The selected option from the options array.

rationale.description: Why this option was chosen over the alternatives.

date.description: ISO 8601 date the decision was made (e.g. "2026-04-03").

supersededBy.description: ID of the DesignDecision that replaced this one (only when status is "superseded").
